specific_question: In March 2024, what percentage of Elexion’s North American service requests were related to vehicle software updates compared to hardware issues?
answer: Elexion’s internal service dashboard recorded that 62% of service requests in March 2024 were related to software updates, which highlighted the growing role of digital systems in customer experience.
